hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" =~ \.py$ ]] && [[ ! "$f" =~ test_ ]] && python -m pytest test_gesture_control.py -q 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; }

echo '{}' | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git push' && (grep -q 'PERF_MONITORING.*true' /home/user/hand-gesture-control/hand_gesture_control.py >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage": "✓ Performance monitoring enabled"}' || echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠ Performance monitoring should be enabled"}') || echo '{}'
